profile.name: Yusuf Çağdaş
profile.subtitle: High school student • Software • Electronics • 3D Design

about: I am Yusuf Çağdaş, a high school student interested in software, electronics, and 3D design. I like turning ideas into working prototypes with Arduino, microcontrollers, web technologies, and CAD modeling. I learn through competitions, personal projects, and experiments, and I try to make every project cleaner, more useful, and easier to build.
